title: Disappeared
description: Plays funny sounds when players around teleport/leave the game
body:
# Disappeared
**a _CLIENT_ side mod that turns the boring disappearance of players into a smooth vanishing with a random sound.**
###  <font color="orange">has 6 standard sounds</font>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KxuMYeb4Wis" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## warning
## If you have optimization mods installed or are connected to a server with a limited player rendering distance, 
### **reduce the detection radius**.
![config screen _radius](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5f29df8e1b106f47ea4b2cf581a232cbb230632.jpeg)


## How to use
Press "O" or change keybinding to open menu

![main_screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a15ab215a671631dbfcadbfcca14d07d593ef90.jpeg)

You can change active sounds and even add your own. (Place files with extensions .ogg, .mp3, .wav into the folder that opens with the button below)

![sounds screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d26f45b7c1146b18ea15f8a9c5b4d5d9ac3b496.jpeg)

### Configurable

![config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54c04180f707f7decc93a8ad13d2d56852ce67db.jpeg)
